CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, string_value VARCHAR, like_specifier VARCHAR, escape_character VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE results AS SELECT id, like_escape(string_value, like_specifier, escape_character) AS is_match FROM test_strings;
SELECT * FROM results WHERE is_match = TRUE;
SELECT * FROM results WHERE is_match = FALSE;
SELECT id, string_value FROM test_strings WHERE like_escape(string_value, 'special_%%chars', '%') = TRUE;
SELECT DISTINCT id FROM (SELECT id, like_escape(string_value, like_specifier, escape_character) as match_result FROM test_strings) WHERE match_result = TRUE;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE like_escape(string_value, like_specifier, escape_character) = TRUE AND id < 5;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS match_count FROM results WHERE is_match = TRUE AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_strings WHERE id = results.id);
